banner.label: LABEL hunter.dossier="architecture,transmission,precision" # metadata nobody reads
banner.icon.fire: docker run --rm fire-extinguisher:latest # the prod server again
banner.icon.physique: docker stats --no-stream # the most physical docker gets
banner.icon.pousse-res: restart: on-failure:9999 # resistance through sheer stubbornness
header.subtitle:
FROM developer:senior AS formateur
RUN apk add --no-cache aspnet angular symfony
# yes we're installing frameworks via apk. no I will not elaborate.
header.cta.resume.bottom: VOLUME /app/resume # persistent resume. survives container death.
header.cta.replay.top: docker restart animation # replay = restart. elegant.
header.cta.replay.bottom: docker-compose up animation --force-recreate # nuclear replay option
snippets.transmission.title: FROM teacher:latest AS transmission
snippets.transmission.content:
services:
  transmission:
    image: knowledge-sharing:9years
    environment:
      - TEACHING_STYLE=hands-on
      - PATIENCE=infinite
    deploy:
      resources:
        reservations:
          cpus: '4.0'
          memory: 16G
    # teaching containers need MORE resources than prod
    # because students will docker rm -f everything
    # ask me how I know
snippets.stack.title: docker images --format '{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}' | grep stack
snippets.stack.content:
services:
  stack:
    image: fullstack:modern
    depends_on:
      angular:
        condition: service_healthy
      dotnet:
        condition: service_healthy
      symfony:
        condition: service_healthy
    # if any dependency is unhealthy, the whole stack crashes
    # just like real microservices
    healthcheck:
      test: curl -f http://localhost/am-i-still-sane || exit 1
      interval: 10s
snippets.architecture.title:
docker-compose config --services | wc -l
# 47 services. 'micro' is relative.
snippets.architecture.content:
# Architecture decision record:
# Day 1: monolith (1 container)
# Day 30: 'let's split this up' (3 containers)
# Day 90: microservices (47 containers)
# Day 91: kubernetes (someone said it at standup)
# Day 92: back to monolith (1 container, but bigger)
# Day 93: docker-compose down. went for a walk.
snippets.opensource.title: docker push ghcr.io/opensource:contributor
snippets.opensource.content:
# Open source via Docker:
# Step 1: docker pull interesting-project
# Step 2: docker build --no-cache . (takes 45 min)
# Step 3: docker push fix/typo-in-readme
# Step 4: PR rejected (Dockerfile not optimized)
# Step 5: squash 47 layers into 1
# Step 6: PR merged. 2 bytes changed. 3 days spent.
snippets.quality.title: docker scan quality --severity critical
snippets.quality.content:
# Quality pipeline:
# 1. docker build --target test (runs tests)
# 2. docker build --target lint (runs linter)
# 3. docker build --target pray (custom stage)
# 4. docker push :latest
# 5. docker push :latest-probably-works
# 6. docker push :latest-rollback-ready-just-in-case
